creator: god@virtualpage.de
text:
PortinstallKaffeine fails


"checking for pkg-config... /usr/local/bin/pkg-config

checking for gstreamer-0.8 >= 0.8.11.1... configure: error: no GStreamer found
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to multimedia@FreeBSD.org [maintainer]"

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: portinstall kaffeine
